Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: initialize DevLens package with CC01 scaffold and CC02 clean files

CC01 creates the package scaffold \(config, types, provider, styles\).
CC02 copies 23 zero/low-coupling files from AK12 token-editor into
the DevLens package structure with all internal imports rewritten to
relative paths. References to not-yet-migrated modules \(token-registry,
class-categories, token-migration-map, scale-baseline-config\) are
flagged with PENDING comments for CC03/CC04.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(DL-CC03\): refactor high-coupling config files to be config-driven

Replace hardcoded AK12 scale baseline and TOKEN_OVERRIDES with
config-driven alternatives that read from DevLens context. Creates
token-registry, scale-baseline, and use-scale-baseline; rewrites
scale-step-lookup to accept baseline param; updates three callers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json

with open\('/Users/dorenberge/.claude/projects/-Users-dorenberge-WorkInProgress-VIBE-Dev-Lens/fe0a51fa-04f3-4f88-abb3-90c8b748f697.jsonl', 'r'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)
    
    # Look for messages that mention the spec
    for i, line in enumerate\(lines\):
        if i < 250 or i > 340:  # Focus on CC04 section
            continue
        try:
            obj = json.loads\(line\)
            # Get the full text content
            if 'message' in obj:
                msg = obj['message']
                if 'content' in msg:
                    content_list = msg['content'] if isinstance\(msg['content'], list\) else [msg['content']]
                    for item in content_list:
                        if isinstance\(item, dict\) and 'text' in item:
                            full_text = item['text']
                            # Look for spec markers
                            if 'categorizeClass\\n\\n' in full_text or '## class-categories.ts' in full_text or 'Here is the CC04 spec' in full_text:
                                print\(f"\\n===== FOUND AT LINE {i+1} =====\\n"\)
                                print\(full_text\)
                                exit\(0\)
        except:
            pass
    
    print\("Spec not found in expected format, trying alternate search..."\)
PYEOF)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(DL-CC04\): refactor medium-coupling files to be config-driven

Create class-categories.ts and token-migration-map.ts as config-driven
utilities — callers pass project-specific text-size classes and migration
maps via useDevLensConfig instead of relying on hardcoded constants.
Wire DEFAULT_MIGRATION_MAP with confidence levels into defaults.ts.
Remove all CC04 PENDING comments from 4 caller files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('/Users/dorenberge/.claude/projects/-Users-dorenberge-WorkInProgress-VIBE-Dev-Lens/5fe7a27f-7960-44fe-94ac-b6cebb6287f0.jsonl'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)
    obj = json.loads\(lines[318]\)
    msg = obj.get\('message', {}\)
    content = msg.get\('content', []\)
    for block in content:
        if isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\('type'\) == 'tool_result':
            text = str\(block.get\('content', ''\)\)
            if 'drawerStyle' in text:
                with open\('/tmp/drawer_block.txt', 'w'\) as out:
                    out.write\(text\)
                print\(f'Wrote {len\(text\)} chars'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(DL-CC05\): refactor low-coupling files — eliminate all AK12 references

Create 6 files from AK12 source with config-driven changes:
- use-token-editor.ts: namespace-derived BroadcastChannel, tokenOverrides
- use-dock-position.ts: namespace-derived localStorage keys
- use-detached-window.ts: namespace + detachedRoute from config
- ModularScaleControl.tsx: --devlens-preview-font CSS var for font preview
- TokenEditorControls.tsx: adapted to Dev_Lens registry API
- DevLensDrawer.tsx: renamed from TokenEditorDrawer, sets preview font var

Update cc-prompt-generator.ts to reference DevLens config instead of AK12 path.

Known: TokenEditorControls.tsx has @/components/ui/accordion import \(CC06 fix\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(DL-CC06\): replace shadcn Accordion with internal component

Eliminate @radix-ui/react-accordion and @/components/ui/accordion
dependencies by creating a lightweight internal Accordion with React
context state management, scrollHeight animation, and data-state attrs.
Remove all !important overrides from accordion CSS rules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(DL-CC07\): extract inline styles to devlens.css

Move all inline <style> content from DevLensDrawer.tsx into an external
CSS file and convert trigger button inline styles to CSS classes
\(.te-trigger, .te-trigger-dot-baseline, .te-trigger-badge\). The
drawerStyle useMemo remains as-is for dynamic positional styles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
